UAE సంస్థల నుండి $5 బిలియన్లకు పైగా పెట్టుబడి 
భారత బ్యాంకింగ్ రంగంలో $3 బిలియన్లు పెట్టుబడి పెట్టేందుకు Emirates NBD సంసిద్ధత

text: RBL Bank Announces Receipt of All Regulatory and Governmental Approvals for Strategic Investment by Emirates NBD. post: Yesterday in Abu Dhabi. Emirates NBD invested AED 11.02 billion for a 60% stake in RBL Bank. ADIA invested AED 3.67 billion into India's NIIF. A short yet impactful UAE visit has unlocked major economic momentum for India: UAE investors signal multi-billion dollar confidence in India's future, Emirates NBD strengthens India's financial landscape with a $3 billion commitment, and ADIA joins hands with NIIF for a $1 billion infrastructure investment boost. From diplomacy to development, India is emerging as the world's most trusted growth destination.
post_highlights: From diplomacy to development, India is emerging as the world's most trusted growth destination. • India's global stature continues to rise under PM Narendra Modi.

post:
Middle East Banks  
These banks have completed the integration and started injecting trial liquidity.  

_Saudi Arabia  
Al Rajhi Bank and the National Bank of Saudi Arabia (SNB).  
Status: Node synchronization active.  
Linking wallets to the developed payment system.  

_United Arab Emirates  
First Abu Dhabi Bank (FAB)  
and Emirates NBD (ENBD)  
Activating the digital dirham as a bridge for payments.  

_Egypt  
Central Bank of Egypt  
(via the new digital currency gateway)  
and Bank of Egypt.  

Status: Security check for cross-border transactions.  

_Qatar  
Qatar National Bank (QNB)  
Injecting and preparing liquidity allocated for the travel and aviation services sector.  

#PiNetwork

post: Unfortunately, I had a failed experience with you. A week ago, I transferred my debt to Emirates Bank and completed all the procedures, but the hold on the financing amount is still in place. The employee stated before the procedures that the hold would be lifted after the salary confirmation letter, and I have contacted them via email without receiving a response and filed a complaint. I do not recommend this, and I am currently looking for another bank starting tomorrow.
